# Yash Soni

> Senior Full Stack Architect · AI/ML Solution Builder · SaaS Product Engineer

## Contact & Availability

- **Location:** Mumbai, India
- **Open to:** Freelance & contract work worldwide
- **Email:** yash.soni2737@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://yashsoni.dev
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/yashsoni369
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/yashsoni369

## Professional Summary

Senior Full Stack Architect with 8+ years building scalable AI & SaaS solutions. Led teams of 10+ engineers. Built GenAI platforms deployed in US law firms that helped secure $2M+ in funding. Certified Kubernetes Application Developer (CKAD).

End-to-end ownership across architecture → development → deployment → scaling, collaborating closely with clients and engineering teams worldwide.

## Services

1. **Full Stack Architecture** - React, Angular, Next.js, Node.js, .NET Core, Python, TypeScript
2. **AI/ML Engineering** - RAG, Vector DBs, Text2SQL, Semantic Search, AI Agents, Prompt Engineering
3. **SaaS Product Development** - Multi-tenancy, scalable APIs, microservices, event-driven architecture
4. **DevOps & Cloud** - AWS, Azure, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes (CKAD certified), CI/CD pipelines

## Key Projects

### DecoverAI - AI Legal Document Platform ($2M Funded)
AI-powered legal document management & query platform for US law firms. Built infrastructure and GenAI platform that helped secure $2M+ seed funding from Bay Area VCs. 13 months of development.
- Tech: Python, React, Node.js, OpenAI, Pinecone, MongoDB

### Speakology AI - AI Language Learning (Bootstrapped)
First AI Avatar language learning app for UK schools. Bootstrapped from zero to 10+ school subscriptions in 3 months.
- Tech: Node.js, React, MongoDB, OpenAI, Prompt Engineering

### United Medical - Healthcare Contract Management
Hospital-doctor contract management application for a German healthcare startup.
- Tech: React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, TypeScript

### Mappie AI - AI Project Management
Transforms messy requirements into dev-ready user stories. 1 year from idea to execution.
- Tech: React, TypeScript, OpenAI, Node.js

### Vectro AI - Sales Intelligence
Actionable insights from sales calls, emails & Slack communications using AI and vector search.
- Tech: Node.js, OpenAI, Vector DB, TypeScript

### Infinity AIWatch - Enterprise APM (LTI Mindtree)
Application Performance Monitoring product with AI-driven insights dashboards.
- Tech: React, Python, OpenAI, PostgreSQL, InfluxDB, Prometheus

### Infinity DevOps - DevOps Platform (LTI Mindtree)
Tech Lead for team of 10 developers building DevOps IP products across AWS and GCP.
- Tech: Angular, React, Node.js, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, GCP

## Work Experience

### Freelance Contracts (Dec 2023 - Present)
Independent contractor for US, UK, and German clients. AI & SaaS full stack architecture.

### LTI Mindtree (June 2021 - Nov 2023)
Senior Engineering Specialist. Led COE Team of 10+ Engineers.

### Azentio Software (May 2020 - June 2021)
Senior Software Engineer. SaaS product engineering with multi-tenancy.

### Abacus Infosystems (Dec 2018 - Apr 2020)
Software Developer. .NET Core, Angular, microservices.

### Threepin Infotech (Jan 2017 - Dec 2018)
Software Developer. .NET to full stack progression.

## Tech Stack

- **AI/ML:** OpenAI, Claude, Qdrant, pgVector, RAG, Text2SQL, Prompt Engineering, AWS Sagemaker
- **Frontend:** React, Angular, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend:** Node.js, .NET Core, Python, FastAPI, NestJS, Express
- **Databases:** MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, InfluxDB
- **Cloud:** AWS (EC2, EKS, Sagemaker), Azure, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, Nginx, CI/CD
- **Tools:** Git, JIRA, Azure DevOps, Postman, Kafka, Jenkins
